description: CompositionGrey round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with graphic on the front FittingComfort         Wash care Light machine wash Do not bleach Do not dry clean Do not scrub Dry flat/reverse Warm iron on reverse Get ready to start climbing, start achieving and overcoming all challenges in life with this Mt. Everest tee from inkfruit. The graphic of the climbing man represents the attitude of perseverance in all of us. Team this cotton t-shirt with faded denims and fashionable lifestyle shoes available in a wide range at myntra and get ready to be inspired and inspire others around you.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
